go-task-runner.summary: A CLI tool to run JSON-defined tasks with simple interval scheduling, designed for small homelab workflows.
facts: It simplifies the execution of repetitive tasks and provides a simple way to manage and monitor them.
The Execute function runs tasks using the exec package in Go.
The ScheduleLogged function logs the output of each task execution.
go-task-runner.role: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 120 lines across 7 files over 7 active days.

personal-portfolio-site.summary: A lightweight static portfolio site that highlights projects, skills, and coursework.
facts: Users can easily view their projects, skills, and coursework in a clean and accessible format.
Displaying a list of projects with details such as name, summary, stack, and status.
Adding a CTA to scroll to the projects section.
Rendering a skills section with a list of skills.
Using JavaScript to dynamically render projects and skills.
Implementing a CTA to scroll to the projects section.
personal-portfolio-site.role: Sole developer, adding 110 lines across 6 files over 21 active days.

sensor-fleet-backend.summary: A web API service for ingesting IoT sensor readings with in-memory storage and health checks.
facts: It provides a simple and efficient way to manage and analyze sensor data, allowing users to track sensor health and detect anomalies.
FastAPI framework for building the web API
sensor-fleet-backend.role: Contributed 43% of the codebase, adding 96 lines across 7 files over 10 active days.

infra-terraform.summary: Terraform configuration for a small app stack with VPC, subnets, and an app module with S3 logging bucket, intended for study/demo environments.
facts: This project provides a structured way to manage infrastructure using Terraform, which is beneficial for developers and IT professionals who need to quickly set up and manage cloud resources.
Terraform configuration files (.tf) are used to define infrastructure resources.
Remote state management is implemented using a remote state bucket for production environments.
infra-terraform.role: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 111 lines across 6 files over 7 active days.

algorithms-toolkit.summary: A Python CLI tool for performing common algorithms like BFS, DFS, and binary search on tiny datasets.
facts: It helps software developers and interviewers quickly test and verify their algorithm implementations.
The project uses Python's argparse library to handle command-line arguments.
It includes a load_graph function to parse graph data from a file.
algorithms-toolkit.role: Sole developer, adding 162 lines across 8 files over 18 active days.

java-chat-service.summary: A tiny HTTP chat service using Java's built-in HttpServer to store and serve messages in memory.
facts: Provides a simple, lightweight chat service for local development and testing.
Exposes RESTful endpoints for health checks, message retrieval, and sending new messages
Validates incoming messages for empty text
Uses Java's built-in HttpServer for HTTP communication
Stores messages in a synchronized list for thread safety
java-chat-service.role: Contributed 30% of the codebase, adding 130 lines across 5 files over 7 active days.

campus-navigation-api.summary: A TypeScript Express API for campus pathfinding and schedule-aware routing, providing endpoints for health, building listings, and shortest-path calculations.
facts: Users can find the shortest path between buildings, check building schedules, and access building information.
TypeScript and Express are used for the project
Graph data structure is implemented for pathfinding
campus-navigation-api.role: Contributed 36% of the codebase, adding 194 lines across 10 files over 9 active days.

ml-lab-notebooks.summary: A library of machine learning experiments and utilities for data analysis and regression tasks.
facts: Provides a collection of tools for data preprocessing, model training, and evaluation, which can be used by data scientists and analysts.
Linear regression and logistic regression experiments
Uses Pandas for data manipulation and NumPy for numerical computations
Includes a variety of machine learning algorithms and evaluation metrics
ml-lab-notebooks.role: Contributed 32% of the codebase, adding 71 lines across 8 files over 7 active days.
